creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
As part of one of the dependencies from math/dynare, the print/texinfo is pulled and it fails to fetch at least one file. Here is the log:

https://redports.org/~fernape/20140306100817-63387-181652/texinfo-5.2.20140209.log

The upstream project seems to have rerolled the file or something.

Fix: 

Patch is not provided. I contacted the maintainer (johans@) and let him know there's a PR about it.
How-To-Repeat: in redports:

cd /usr/ports/print/texinfo && make fetch
